finding_results.notes: Replaced impossible single-ride bus geography with a coherent museum-to-Sunset Park route: 2 train from Eastern Parkway-Brooklyn Museum, transfer at Atlantic Avenue-Barclays to the R, arrival at 45th Street in Sunset Park.

Explicitly reconciled chip state by stating Marisol removed the blue chip from the apartment cassette at dawn and temporarily stowed it in her museum cubby before the meeting; cassette remains at home.

Expanded Ada's separation into concrete boundaries (no calls or in-person contact for seven days, text-only check-in, no workplace visits) and rendered Marisol's reaction with immediate bodily detail (impact against partition, cheek bite, hand numbness).
Rebuilt opening paragraph to start inside suspension machinery (badge gate anomaly + legal summons), removing the repeated commuter-weather 'By the time' launch pattern.

summary: All four pass-scoped structural/craft findings were addressed in-place: opening architecture now ignites with suspension conflict, transit causality is geographically coherent, blue-chip continuity aligns with the chapter-09 boundary state, and the Ada rupture beat now carries explicit boundaries plus embodied consequence.
